# Memory Access → Load

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Memory Access → Load

Load

Instruction Type and Width              Instruction description
Load DW into 32 bit register            Load 32 bit double word
Load DW into 40 bit register signed     Load signed 40 bit
Load DW into 40 bit register unsigned   Load unsigned 40 bit
Load coefficient                        Load 32 bit coefficient
Load extension                          Load extension bits
Load predicate                          Load predicate register
                                        Load signed 16 bit word with rounding. Each result which is
Load signed W rounded
                                        written, the low part is written with 0x8000
Load signed W unrounded                 Load 16 bit word without rounding
                                        Load unsigned 16 bit with rounding. Each result which is written
Load unsigned W rounded                 is zero-extended instead of sign-extended. In addition, each
                                        result which is written, the low part is written with 0x8000
                                        Load unsigned 16 bit word without rounding. Each result which
Load unsigned W unrounded
                                        is written is zero-extended instead of sign-extended.
